text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: At this rate, I won't be able to entertain anyone...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What is it I'm missing? Determination? Passion?
Or...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that I lack what it takes to be an
entertainer?
choice_data_list:
Don't give up! This isn't what anyone wants of
you!

Don't give up! This isn't what anyone wants of
you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that I lack what it takes to be an
entertainer?
choice_data_list:
Don't give up! This isn't what anyone wants of
you!

Don't give up! This isn't what anyone wants of
you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list:
You're really worried about your performance,
huh?

You're really worried about your performance,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But of course. I want more than anyone to thrill
and amaze my fans.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how much worry and stress I must
suffer if it means I can accomplish that!
choice_data_list: Then you have what it takes.
Then you have what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to fuss over this a while longer, even if
it ends up delaying my progress.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I need to get back into the right mindset to race
as an entertainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's right... This isn't the Fuji Kiseki everyone
desires...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have fans waiting for me to deliver them a
miracle!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer! I'm not going to lose again!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll give everyone a show so marvelous, it'll thrill
them to their core!
